passiveAbilities.name: Conservation
passiveAbilities.description: If a friendly Animal within 4" and LoS suffers Dmg, you may have this character suffer all that Dmg instead.

passiveAbilities.name: Explorer's Handbook
passiveAbilities.description: When this character uses an Arcane Ability targetting a friendly Animal that is not at full health, you may reduce the energy cost by -1.

passiveAbilities.name: The Faculty
passiveAbilities.description: If Old Polly, Prof. Boffinsworth and Flinder Memphis were taken in this troupe at the start of the game, this character gains Rogue, Animal and Machine Keywords.

arcaneAbilities.name: Healing
arcaneAbilities.description:
Target restores X+1 Wds.
Catastrophe: This model suffers 2 Wds

arcaneAbilities.name: Symbiosis
arcaneAbilities.description:
Target or this model gains [Protection: the first time this character would suffer Dmg, reduce that Dmg to W], until end of the turn.
Target and this model gain Protection until end of turn.
Catastrophe: Target and this model suffer 2 Wds.

signatureMove.name: Boff's Bestiary
signatureMove.endStepEffect: Reduce Dmg suffered by -1 for each Animal within 4".
